legal_description.parcel_1: LOT 3 OF TRACT NO. 10107, AS PER MAP RECORDED IN BOOK 448, PAGES 42 TO 44 INCLUSIVE OF MISCELLANEOUS MAPS, IN THE OFFICE OF THE COUNTY RECORDER OF SAID ORANGE COUNTY.
legal_description.easements: RESERVING THEREFROM, NON-EXCLUSIVE EASEMENTS FOR ACCESS, INGRESS, EGRESS, ENCROACHMENT, SUPPORT, DRAINAGE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES, ALL AS DESCRIBED IN THE "DECLARATION" AND "MASTER DECLARATION" REFERRED TO IN EXHIBIT "A" ATTACHED HERETO AND INCORPORATED HEREIN BY THIS REFERENCE.
legal_description.mineral_exception: EXCEPTING THEREFROM, ALL MINERALS, OIL, GAS, PETROLEUM, AND OTHER HYDROCARBON SUBSTANCES AND ALL UNDERGROUND WATER IN OR UNDER OR WHICH MAY BE PRODUCED FROM SAID LAND WHICH UNDERLIES A PLANE PARALLEL TO AND 500 FEET BELOW THE PRESENT SURFACE OF SAID LAND FOR THE PURPOSE OF PROSPECTING FOR, THE EXPLORATION, DEVELOPMENT, PRODUCTION, EXTRACTION AND TAKING OF SAID MINERALS, OIL, GAS, PETROLEUM, AND OTHER HYDROCARBON SUBSTANCES AND WATER FROM SAID LAND BY MEANS OF MINES, WELLS, DERRICKS, OR OTHER EQUIPMENT FROM SURFACE LOCATIONS OR ADJOINING OR NEIGHBORING LAND OR LYING OUTSIDE OF THE ABOVE DESCRIBED LAND, IT BEING UNDERSTOOD THAT THE OWNER OF SUCH MINERALS, OIL, GAS, PETROLEUM, AND OTHER HYDROCARBON SUBSTANCES AND WATER, AS SET FORTH ABOVE, SHALL HAVE NO RIGHT TO ENTER UPON THE SURFACE OF THE ABOVE DESCRIBED LAND NOR TO USE ANY OF THE SAID LAND OR ANY PORTION THEREOF ABOVE SAID PLANE PARALLEL TO AND 500 FEET BELOW THE PRESENT SURFACE OF THE SAID LAND FOR ANY PURPOSE WHATSOEVER.

deeds_of_trust.conclusion: After full document image review, the subject property at 5915 E Calle Principia has at most 2 active liens: (1) Partners FCU HELOC at $250,000 (confirmed open), and (2) Empire of America DOT at $573,400 (potentially open — may be released by Reconveyance #2026000053382). The $150,000 Quicken/Schwab HELOC is confirmed reconveyed. Two Empire DOTs previously flagged as potentially open actually secure different properties.

tax_information.note: Payment status could not be confirmed due to CAPTCHA restrictions on the OC Treasurer portal (taxbill.octreasurer.gov). Manual verification recommended using APN 363-313-04.

notes_and_observations.property_ownership_pre_2021: ANTHONY MASTRANGELO and GEORGIANN MASTRANGELO held title to 5915 E Calle Principia as Husband and Wife, as Joint Tenants. Confirmed by the Trust Transfer Deed (Doc #2021000188481). Their financing history on the subject property spans over 25 years, including: Partners FCU DOT (1999, reconveyed 2003); ABN AMRO DOT ($322,700, 2003); HELOC ($250K, 2005); Citibank DOT ($417K, 2015); Partners FCU HELOC ($150K, 2016, reconveyed 2017); Quicken Loans DOT ($408,402, 2017, reconveyed 11/2020) + HELOC ($150K, 2017, reconveyed 11/2020); Quicken Loans DOT ($575K, 2020, reconveyed 04/2021). All prior liens are confirmed reconveyed.
notes_and_observations.heloc_150k_resolved: $150,000 HELOC — RESOLVED: The Quicken Loans HELOC (DOT #2017000134002, dated 03/25/2017, $150,000, assigned to Charles Schwab Bank via Doc #2017000154868) was reconveyed by Quicken Loans on November 16, 2020. Two reconveyances were filed: Inst. #2020000670636 (recorded 11/19/2020) and Inst. #2020000670635 (duplicate, same date).
notes_and_observations.trust_formation_2021: The MASTRANGELO FAMILY TRUST was created on February 3, 2021. The Trust Transfer Deed (Doc #2021000188481, recorded 03/18/2021) transferred the subject property. Documentary transfer tax was $0 (R&T 11930 exemption — transfer into living trust). A companion deed (Doc #2021000188480) was recorded the same day with middle initials.
notes_and_observations.empire_of_america_dots_resolved: Three Empire of America/MERS Trust Deeds were recorded within 34 days (03/16/2021 – 04/19/2021). Full document review reveals they secure three different properties in the Mastrangelo investment portfolio. Only $573,400 encumbers the subject.
notes_and_observations.current_financing_2026: The most recent Trust Deed (Doc #2026000034332, recorded 02/13/2026) is a $250,000 REVOLVING CREDIT DEED OF TRUST (HELOC) in favor of PARTNERS FEDERAL CREDIT UNION. Dated January 23, 2026. 20-year term. Trustor signs in dual capacity: individually AND as Trustee.
notes_and_observations.picciotta_daniela_acquisition: Grant Deed Doc #2021000182215 conveys from PICCIOTTA DANIELA to MASTRANGELO ANTHONY MICHAEL TR, recorded 03/16/2021. Based on the same-day purchase money DOT (#2021000182216) which secures 148 S Auburn Heights Ln (APN 938-286-37), this Grant Deed most likely conveys that property, not the subject.
notes_and_observations.name_variant_anthony_j: Two assignment documents from 2007 and 2008 reference "MASTRANGELO ANTHONY J" — a different middle initial than the subject borrower (ANTHONY MICHAEL). LOW relevance — likely a different individual.
notes_and_observations.trust_affidavit_discrepancy: Affidavit Doc #2025000155224 (recorded 06/02/2025) references "MASTRANGELO FAMILY TRUST" but names ANTHONY MARIO and JO ANNE as Co-Trustees. Most likely a different Mastrangelo Family Trust (possibly parents or relatives). Document review recommended to confirm.

examiner_recommendations.detail: Download and read this 1-page reconveyance (recorded 02/23/2026) to determine which Trust Deed it releases. If it releases the Empire DOT (#2021000262319, $573,400), the subject property has only one active lien (Partners FCU HELOC, $250K).

Read Affidavit Doc #2025000155224 to confirm the "MASTRANGELO FAMILY TRUST" with Co-Trustees ANTHONY MARIO and JO ANNE is a different trust than the subject property's trust. If same trust with amended trustees, current vesting may be affected.
Verify current 2025-2026 tax payment status at taxbill.octreasurer.gov using APN 363-313-04. The 2nd installment ($2,040.00) was due April 10, 2026.

Run recorder name search for PICCIOTTA DANIELA if the Grant Deed (#2021000182215) is confirmed to affect the subject property. However, since the same-day DOT secures 148 S Auburn Heights Ln, this Grant Deed likely conveys that property instead.
Perform judgment search at OC Superior Court and CA Secretary of State (UCC) for both ANTHONY MICHAEL MASTRANGELO and GEORGIANN IRENE MASTRANGELO.
Obtain a full CLTA/ALTA title insurance commitment before any transaction.

disclaimer: This report is for informational purposes only and does not constitute a commitment to insure title. The information contained herein has been obtained from public records maintained by the Orange County Clerk-Recorder and is believed to be accurate but is not warranted. A full title insurance commitment should be obtained for any real estate transaction. This report identifies open encumbrances that require verification and resolution before any transaction can proceed.
